description.zh: 50+ 工具的注册、Schema 验证、权限检查和执行分发流程
description.en: Registration, schema validation, permission check, and execution dispatch for 50+ tools

annotation.zh: 初始化空的工具注册表
文件操作三件套注册到 Map
annotation.en: File operation trio registered to Map

content.zh:
注册 BashTool:
  schema: { command: z.string() }
  安全层: bashSecurity (100KB)
  权限层: bashPermissions (96KB)
content.en:
Register BashTool:
  schema: { command: z.string() }
  Security layer: bashSecurity (100KB)
  Permission layer: bashPermissions (96KB)

annotation.zh: 最复杂的工具，自带 300KB 安全代码
annotation.en: Most complex tool, comes with 300KB security code

content.zh: 帮我查看 src 目录有哪些文件
content.en: Help me see what files are in the src directory

annotation.zh: 用户请求触发工具调用

content.zh:
工具分发:
1. toolRegistry.get('BashTool') ✓
2. schema.parse(input) ✓
3. permissions.check() ✓ (ls 是只读)
4. tool.execute() → 开始执行
content.en:
Tool dispatch:
1. toolRegistry.get('BashTool') ✓
2. schema.parse(input) ✓
3. permissions.check() ✓ (ls is read-only)
4. tool.execute() → Start execution

annotation.zh: 4 步分发流程：查找→验证→权限→执行
工具执行完成，结果返回给模型
annotation.en: Tool execution complete, result returned to model

content.zh: src 目录下有 4 个文件/目录：auth.ts, index.ts, utils/, tests/
content.en: There are 4 files/directories in src: auth.ts, index.ts, utils/, tests/

annotation.zh: 模型看到工具结果后回复用户
annotation.en: Model replies to user after seeing tool result
